candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total row because it is the primary specific label and values match Total Revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue row, but appears to duplicate Revenue exactly, so lower priority.

variables.notes: Selected the primary revenue line rather than the duplicate total row.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; appears in the main operating cost section below revenue.
Operating overhead personnel cost component; appropriate SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket excluding depreciation/amortization and finance items; appropriate SG&A component.
Overhead-related, but appears to be a subcomponent within Other operating expenses, so selecting it alongside that row would likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not an income statement operating expense; not suitable for SG&A.
Headcount metric, not an expense row; not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected the best overhead buckets and excluded Marketing Expense to avoid double counting within Other operating expenses. Excluded depreciation/amortization and COGS per rules.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided Income Statement.

candidates.why: Single reported finance-cost line available across years; best fallback when separate interest rows are incomplete and cannot be summed under the priority-line rule.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component, but only one part of total interest cost and blank in 2025; using it alone would understate years with lease interest.
Specific interest expense component, but only lease-related and blank in 2025; not a complete company-wide interest expense line.
Finance-related but not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure only; not the main reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Used the single main finance-expense line because separate interest rows are components that would require summation, which is not allowed here.

candidates.why: Best match for parent/common shareholders' equity and preferable to Total Equity when no non-controlling interest line is present.
Acceptable only if no owner/parent equity line exists; here Shareholders' Equity - Total is more precise.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company

Equity component only, not total book equity.

Balancing helper row, not the primary equity measure.
Entire balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Preferred shareholders' equity over total equity to avoid any potential inclusion of non-controlling interests.
